description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with two rectangular volumes offset from each other, creating a stepped layout. The exterior is clad in a light, wood-textured material, giving it a natural and contemporary appearance. Large, dark-framed windows are present on the front and side facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The flat roof design enhances the modern aesthetic and offers potential for rooftop use. The structure appears to be single-story, with no visible porch or veranda. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with paired windows on the front and single windows on the sides.
description: A modern, light wood-textured bungalow with two offset rectangular sections, flat roofs, and asymmetrical dark-framed windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, paired windows on each section, highlighting the offset stepped design.
description_view_1: Side view with a single narrow window on each section, emphasizing the depth and offset of the volumes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with single narrow windows, mirroring the other side but from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view with single windows on each section, showing the stepped layout and flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with paired front windows and single side windows
